chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-233 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution. 09.03.2026 = None present for the applicant. However, the case diaries available online were placed by the Research Officer of this Court, which show that in Summary Execution No.03/2022, matter has been patched up by the parties outside the court through intervention of the Nekmards of the locality and the decree stands satisfied vide order dated 29.11.2025. Such report is taken on record and, in view thereof, the Civil Revision Application has become infructuous, which is accordingly dismissed along with the pending applications. JUDGE *Faisal*
